title: Feedback Loop Engine (gradient descent on Genome, conservative LR)
description: Implement the online learning loop in lib/genome/feedback.ts. On each user feedback event (not-interested / saved / purchased), apply a small gradient-descent update to the Genome vector. Learning rate must be conservative (≤ 0.05) to avoid preference drift. Uses cosine-similarity loss. Updated vector persisted via saveGenome() (P1.5) and broadcast via SYNC_STATE. Multi-Armed Bandit exploration layer for balancing exploitation of known preferences vs. discovery. TDD with synthetic feedback sequences.
